message:
fix(ci): allow partial release publish when some targets lack ORT prebuilts

ort-sys only provides prebuilt ONNX Runtime binaries for aarch64-apple-darwin
and x86_64-pc-windows-msvc. Other targets (musl, x86_64-apple-darwin) fail.
The Publish GitHub Release job now runs even if some build jobs fail, so
available binaries still get published.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -749,7 +749,7 @@ jobs:
 
   release-publish:
     name: Publish GitHub Release
-    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
+    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && !cancelled()
     needs: [release-build, release-build-lite]
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 20
